title: Echternach, Echternach Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Echternach, Echternach Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Echternach is a city in Echternach Canton with a population of 5,700. Luxembourg’s oldest town, famous for its Benedictine abbey, the UNESCO-listed Dancing Procession, and its scenic location on the Sauer River near the German border.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
